title: Senior Software Engineer - Razorpay - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Razorpay - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Razorpay in Faridabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Razorpay:
Razorpay is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Razorpay!
